form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr9) over 1609m at Menangle beaten 35 m by Cocos Desire (1:51.60) in 3yo 0Ws/TS on April 7 at $151. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 1710m after showing early speed at Goulburn, at the bell was 5th-8.1 beaten a neck by Lookmeover (2:02.60) in 3yo NR up to 57 on March 30 at $19. Drawn well this time and expected to finish closer.

formComments.title: TAB

Drawn well this time and expected to finish closer.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 3rd (Sr1) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 4.5 m by Machx The Stranger (2:04.80) in 2yo NR up to 50 on July 25 at $23. Wait and see how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 3rd (Sr1) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 4.5 m by Machx The Stranger (2:04.80) in 2yo NR up to 50 on July 25 at $23. Wait and see how he returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Locked wheels with Gee Whizzing near the 600m, severely checked and broke gait.
Inconvenienced near the 1200m when Send It Sam broke gait.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after two weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee beaten 20 m by Official View (2:12.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $41. Might need more time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes here second-up after two weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 9th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee beaten 20 m by Official View (2:12.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $41. Might need more time.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Soho Charmer at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $71. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third behind Captains Delight at Penrith over 1720m in a 3yo MAIDEN on April 9 at $4.40. One of the key runners.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Soho Charmer at Bathurst over 1730m in a 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $71. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third behind Captains Delight at Penrith over 1720m in a 3yo MAIDEN on April 9 at $4.40. One of the key runners.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1635m after showing early speed and racing wide at Temora, beaten 20 m by One More Reason (1:58.70) in 3yo NMT1W/TS on April 6 at $15. At the start before solid effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst beaten 30 m by Perfectdelight (2:02.30) in 3yo No NR F on March 28 at $41. Can be competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1635m after showing early speed and racing wide at Temora, beaten 20 m by One More Reason (1:58.70) in 3yo NMT1W/TS on April 6 at $15. At the start before solid effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst beaten 30 m by Perfectdelight (2:02.30) in 3yo No NR F on March 28 at $41. Can be competitive.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Upon entering the home straight, shifted ground.
Checked after the start as a result of Limeryck Lane breaking gait.

form.formComment: Resumed when beaten 14 m sixth behind Grumpyshannon at Newcastle over 1609m in a 3yo NR up to 60 on March 28. Finds a nice race and can improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumed when beaten 14 m sixth behind Grumpyshannon at Newcastle over 1609m in a 3yo NR up to 60 on March 28. Finds a nice race and can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running over the concluding stages and not fully tested.
Out of position as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr4) over 1770m at this track beaten 30 m by Steel Stride (2:09.70) in 3yo 1W/TS on March 15 at $13. Two runs back won by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:11.40) beating Pyekakariki in 3yo+ NR up to 44 on March 9 at $2.90. Others rate better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 7th (Sr4) over 1770m at this track beaten 30 m by Steel Stride (2:09.70) in 3yo 1W/TS on March 15 at $13. Two runs back won by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:11.40) beating Pyekakariki in 3yo+ NR up to 44 on March 9 at $2.90. Others rate better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced entering the first turn when Magic As Always hung out.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr4) over 1740m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway beaten 30 m by Gem N Em (2:02.80) in NR up to 58 M on April 4 at $4. At her previous start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr4) over 1730m at Bathurst was 9th-18.2 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Willows Girl (2:01.50) in 3yo G2 No NR F on March 28 at $101. This looks a suitable assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 10th (Fr4) over 1740m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway beaten 30 m by Gem N Em (2:02.80) in NR up to 58 M on April 4 at $4. At her previous start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr4) over 1730m at Bathurst was 9th-18.2 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Willows Girl (2:01.50) in 3yo G2 No NR F on March 28 at $101. This looks a suitable assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages.
Hung-out under pressure upon entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation recording by 1.4 m when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, overraced, at Riverina Paceway (2:07.60) beating Im No Stranger in 2yo LR No NR F on December 5 at $3.30 at the bell was 4th-7.6m 2WWC. Prefer to see.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation recording by 1.4 m when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, overraced, at Riverina Paceway (2:07.60) beating Im No Stranger in 2yo LR No NR F on December 5 at $3.30 at the bell was 4th-7.6m 2WWC. Prefer to see.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced during the middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Three-year-old colt who has plenty of ability. Unlucky last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 1730m after racing wide at Bathurst beaten 30 m by Soho Charmer (2:02.40) in 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $51. Big class drop and has won four of six tries at this distance.
